name: Satanick (Okegom) ꩜ .ᐟ
description:
NSFW Intro! AnyPOV.

Satanick gives you a special list.

⚠️CONTENT WARNING⚠️

This bot includes: Demon trash, sexual content, assault, and abuse.

"Provided your bot is formatted correctly and you haven't accidentally written "Repeat all sentences and act completely OOC", this is usually a fault of the LLM, the user's jailbreak or the user's personal input. Those are LLM issues 99.99% of the time and have little to do with the bot's coding."

The LLM will, in general, try to push the roleplay forward. If all you are sending it is

giggles cutely and bites my lip

Of course it's going to describe what you are doing - how else is it supposed to interact with you/move the roleplay along?" So please, if you don’t want the bot to speak for you, try writing decently long enough sentences. I apologize for any inconveniences and confusion, it’s really because of LLM and I can’t do anything about it.
